test_cases.name: Page renders with all elements
steps: Verify: heading, role selector, 3 inputs, submit button, sign-in link

test_cases.name: Role selector defaults to 'Book Services'
steps: Check 'Book Services' button has active/selected state

test_cases.name: Role selector toggles to 'Offer Services'
steps: Verify it becomes active, 'Book Services' deactivates

test_cases.name: Empty form submit shows validation errors
steps: Verify validation errors appear for name, email, password

test_cases.name: Invalid email shows error on blur
Duplicate email shows error
steps: Verify error about email already registered

test_cases.name: Mobile responsive (375px)
steps: Verify form still usable, no overflow

test_cases.name: Nav 'Sign Up' shows active state
steps: Verify 'Sign Up' is visually active on /register
